environments.label: Simple Warehouse
environments.description: Large open warehouse with shelving units and pallets. Ideal for mobile robot navigation and logistics tasks.

environments.label: Grid Default
environments.description: Flat ground plane with a grid texture. Minimal environment for quick prototyping and testing.

environments.label: Simple Room
environments.description: Single enclosed room with basic walls, floor, and ceiling. Suitable for indoor manipulation tasks.

environments.label: Hospital
environments.description: Multi-room hospital floor layout with corridors, patient rooms, and nurse stations.

environments.label: Office
environments.description: Open-plan office environment with desks, chairs, and partition walls.

robots.label: Franka Panda
robots.description: 7-DOF collaborative robot arm with parallel-jaw gripper. Standard benchmark manipulator.

robots.label: Universal Robots UR10
robots.description: 6-DOF industrial robot arm with 10kg payload capacity and 1300mm reach.

robots.label: Carter v2
robots.description: Differential-drive mobile robot platform with stereo cameras and lidar. Built for navigation research.

objects.label: YCB Cracker Box
objects.description: YCB benchmark object — cracker box with realistic texture and physics properties.

objects.label: YCB Mug
objects.description: YCB benchmark object — standard coffee mug for grasp planning tasks.

objects.label: YCB Banana
objects.description: YCB benchmark object — banana with irregular geometry for grasp testing.

objects.label: Pallet
objects.description: Standard wooden pallet for warehouse and logistics simulation scenarios.

objects.label: Table
objects.description: Simple rectangular table surface for tabletop manipulation experiments.

sensors.label: Pinhole Camera
sensors.description: Standard pinhole camera model with configurable resolution, FOV, and clipping planes.

sensors.label: Rotating Lidar
sensors.description: 360-degree rotating lidar sensor with configurable beam count, range, and rotation rate.

lighting.label: Dome Light
lighting.description: Environment dome light providing ambient illumination from an HDR texture or solid color.

lighting.label: Distant Light
lighting.description: Directional light source simulating sunlight. Uniform parallel rays with configurable angle and intensity.

lighting.label: Sphere Light
lighting.description: Omnidirectional point light with configurable radius, intensity, and color temperature.
